title: Ukrainian Cheese Quesadilla
description: A savory twist on the classic quesadilla, featuring Ukrainian cheese and a buttery twist.
instructions: 1. Preheat a pan over medium heat.
2. Place a slice of buttery bread in the pan, butter-side down.
3. Sprinkle crumbled Ukrainian cheese over the bread.
4. Place the other slice of bread, butter-side up, on top of the cheese.
5. Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bread is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
6. Flip the quesadilla over and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and top with shredded shattering lettuce.
8. Cut into wedges and serve immediately.
